Ghoul.notes: Evolution. Immune to radiation damage and radiation levels.

Gen-2 Synth.notes: Inorganic Body. Immune to radiation and poison; no food, drink, sleep, or breathing needed.

Robot.notes: Inorganic Body. Immune to radiation, poison, and bleeding; no food, drink, sleep, or breathing needed.

Super Mutant.notes: Evolution. Immune to radiation. Superior Strength: Strength +1, minimum 6, and Carry Load +40.

Custom Background.equipment: Choose any background’s starting equipment, or choose your own items at your GM’s discretion with a budget of 850 caps.
